note: Mathlib/AlgebraicTopology/SimplicialComplex/Basic.lean:150 - structure AbstractSimplicialComplex extends PreAbstractSimplicialComplex, docstring: 'a PreAbstractSimplicialComplex which contains all singletons'; matches the Wikipedia def of a downward-closed family of finite sets containing every vertex.
verify_note: decl confirmed at cited line 150 in live mathlib4 checkout (structure, matches cache); docstring quote accurate; IsRelLowerSet faces Finset.Nonempty genuinely encodes downward-closure over nonempty subsets; Wikidata Q4669959 label + WP def confirm the concept; fixing vertex type ι with forall-singleton-membership is a standard convention for this object, so exact/high is justified, not overclaimed.
